subject: docs(audit): sync all documentation with actual codebase state
body:
Full codebase audit revealed documentation drift after Budget→Workspace
rename and category→tags migration. README project structure was missing
12 components, 6 composables, and 2 subdirectories. PRODUCT_DEFINITION
still referenced "budget" throughout and listed 4 unused dependencies
(ApexCharts, Fuse.js, date-fns, Papa Parse). CLAUDE.md referenced a
non-existent EXTRACTION_PLAYBOOK.md file. USER_GUIDE still called the
multi-tag input "Category". Code comment in ExpensesTab used old terms.

Tags: docs, cleanup
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: documentation-audit
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01W6iyg87n2BTiZpzzJ22Mv3
title: sync all documentation with actual codebase state
